name: Test-first coding pod
pattern: Understand issue -> failing test -> patch -> tests -> diff review
scenario: A repo-maintenance agent fixes a parsing regression by proving the failure before editing production code.
workflow_steps: Understand the issue and target behavior.
Write the failing test that reproduces the issue.
Patch only the code needed to pass the test.
Run relevant and full validation gates.
Review the diff and summarize release notes.
policy_gates: No production code is edited before a failing test exists.

input_contract.description: Concrete scenario input for this pattern example.
